description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push to the master branch, ignoring tags. The workflow consists of three main jobs: delete_previous_release to delete the previous development release, draft_release to create a new draft release, and two MXE cross-build jobs (mxe64 and mxe32) for Windows 64-bit and 32-bit builds respectively. Each MXE job sets up the MXE build environment, configures it for NSIS installer builds, runs the build, and uploads the resulting installer as a release asset.
